x-enumeration-literals.name: Full Redemption Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where the entire redeemable balance is converted or utilized.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partial Redemption Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where only a portion of the redeemable balance is converted or utilized.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Redemption Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where value is redeemed into cash or account credit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Goods / Services Redemption Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where value is redeemed for products or services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Redemption Reversal Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that reverses a previously executed redemption, restoring the balance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Redemption Adjustment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that modifies redemption amounts or allocations due to corrections or changes.
